title: ceratostylis subcoerulea
intro: Ceratostylis subcoerulea, also known as the blue orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ceratostylis subcoerulea include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also being used as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ceratostylis subcoerulea can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
